mapper.select: SELECT ID, EQUIP_ID, PRODUCTION_CODE, EQUIP_WEIGHT, ENGINE_POWER, EQUIP_BUY_DATE, EQUIP_USE_DATE, SUPPLY_COMPANY, MANUFACTURER, EMISSION_STANDARD, DEL_FLAG, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, DELETE_BY, DELETE_BY_NAME, DELETE_TIME FROM E_M_EQPT_SUPPLY WHERE EQUIP_ID = #{equipId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO E_M_EQPT_SUPPLY ( ID, EQUIP_ID, PRODUCTION_CODE, EQUIP_WEIGHT, ENGINE_POWER, EQUIP_BUY_DATE, EQUIP_USE_DATE, SUPPLY_COMPANY, MANUFACTURER, EMISSION_STANDARD, DEL_FLAG, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME ) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{equipId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{productionCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{equipWeight,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enginePower,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{equipBuyDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{equipUseDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{supplyCompany,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{manufacturer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{emissionStandard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{loginUserName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE E_M_EQPT_SUPPLY
PRODUCTION_CODE = #{productionCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
EQUIP_WEIGHT = #{equipWeight,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ENGINE_POWER = #{enginePower,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
EQUIP_BUY_DATE = #{equipBuyDate,jdbcType=DATE},
EQUIP_USE_DATE = #{equipUseDate,jdbcType=DATE},
SUPPLY_COMPANY = #{supplyCompany,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MANUFACTURER = #{manufacturer,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
EMISSION_STANDARD = #{emissionStandard,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}
WHERE ID = #{id}

UPDATE E_M_EQPT_SUPPLY SET DEL_FLAG = 1, DELETE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, DELETE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, DELETE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE EQUIP_ID = #{equipId}
